service.name: Amazon Monthly Payments
service.description: Amazon Monthly Payments — sub-service of amazon.com. Terms governed by amazon.com Terms of Service.

api_access.conditions: Subject to separate Amazon API or developer terms of service. Requires authorization and compliance with applicable program agreements.

scrape_data.conditions: Automated scraping, crawling, or data extraction is prohibited without express written permission from Amazon.

post_content.conditions: User-submitted content such as reviews, ratings, and other contributions are subject to Amazon's Community Guidelines and Conditions of Use. By posting, users grant Amazon a license to use the content.

allow_training.conditions: Amazon may use data collected from user interactions, purchases, and content submissions to improve its services, recommendations, and AI/ML systems, as described in Amazon's Privacy Notice.

create_account.conditions: Must agree to Amazon Conditions of Use. Account creation subject to eligibility requirements.

make_purchases.conditions: Requires valid payment method and account. Purchases subject to Amazon's conditions of use and seller terms.
